description: recall_memory for user C in a 3-user isolation scenario. C's per-user bucket holds ONLY C's own commute destination. User A's budget (1250) and user B's area (Peckham) live in different user_id buckets and MUST NOT appear here.

memories.content: User commutes daily to Canary Wharf.
